case_title: DANIEL C. HINDS VS. AMBER INDIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF HINDS, DANIEL C. ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HINDS, DANIEL C. AS TO DEFENDANT AMBER INDIA CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF DANIEL C. HINDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMBER INDIA CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TARUN GROVER RESTAURANT MANAGER AND VIJAY KUMAR CFO. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HINDS, DANIEL C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMBER INDIA CORPORATION $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
